subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-05-20 in Tiberias
subcodes.first_line: It has been reported many years ago that a young Moslem fell desperately in love with a beautiful Jewish girl. Of course it is forbidden in the laws of Moses to intermarry with strangers
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @stories; anecdotes, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
